description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named unix that runs on push to master and v2.0-preview branches, on pull requests, and on a scheduled cron job. Use a build job matrix with ubuntu-latest and macos-latest OS, Python 3.9, and Release config. For each job, check out the code, configure caching, set up Miniconda with Python and conda-forge channels, configure a Conda environment, and build, test, and install Reaktoro using CMake and Ninja.
